Links.Evadava.com

Reserved Painting Routes

These are the currently reserved QR and landing destinations for painting pages. Each route is episode-specific and ready to receive final landing content.

Pattern: https://links.evadava.com/paintings/<episode>_<painting>

Reserved Routes

001_1 001_2 001_3 002_1 002_2 002_3 003_1 003_2 003_3 004_1 004_2 004_3 005_1 005_2 005_3 006_1 006_2 006_3 007_1 007_2 007_3 008_1 008_2 008_3 009_1 009_2 009_3 010_1 010_2 010_3 011_1 011_2 011_3 012_1 012_2 012_3 013_1 013_2 013_3 014_1 014_2 014_3 015_1 015_2 015_3 016_1 016_2 016_3 017_1 017_2 017_3 018_1 018_2 018_3 019_1 019_2 019_3 020_1 020_2 020_3
